ModMetaData.name: RimT - Multithreaded Performance
ModMetaData.author: RimT
ModMetaData.description:
RimT - Multithreaded Performance Optimizer for RimWorld 1.6
Offloads the most expensive game systems to background threads: - Pawn needs (hunger, rest, joy, etc.) - Health condition checks - Pawn relationships recalculation - Job queue thinking (non-critical) - Hauling opportunity scanning - Pathfinding cache warming
Designed to improve TPS/FPS with 200-500+ pawns. Safe, conservative threading - never modifies game state from background threads. All results are applied synchronously on the main thread via a queue.
Compatible with RimWorld 1.6.
